title: guajava fluviatilis
intro: Guajava fluviatilis, also known as the river guava, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Guajava fluviatilis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Guajava fluviatilis is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
